generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the gear transmission of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840Dsl : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller controlling the motor and gear components"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring angular velocity of the motor shaft",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox measuring angular velocity of gearbox output",
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for input current measurement",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance FrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification insights for joint friction in robot axis"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization insights for robot motion parameters"
]

instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control parameters based on friction insights to improve robot motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models integrated with live data",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionInsight, AdjustControlParametersAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualization for robot motion parameters",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural models (BDD and IBD)",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction simulation models",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AAS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset metadata management",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT communication protocol for real-time sensor data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction simulation model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction simulation model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction simulation model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction simulation model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current (I_M) data from sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor angular velocity (ω) from motor encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance GearboxAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox angular velocity (ω) from secondary encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngularVelocityDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ) derived from motor current and angular velocity data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted, GearboxAngularVelocityDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840Dsl, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes, encoders), sensor data streaming via MQTT, processing via Simulink models and AAS, with data visualization in a unified dashboard"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, focusing on real-time monitoring and friction detection during robot operation"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data against measured reference values, with deviation analysis for friction model accuracy"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML modeling standards"
]
